summary: Gruber takes a brief break from his ongoing series about the Mac OS X Finder to enjoy a snow day. The entire post is a playful announcement that technical commentary is on hold because he's outside having fun in the snow. He includes several photos documenting the snowy day. It's a rare purely personal, lighthearted post from the early days of Daring Fireball.
key_points: Gruber pauses his Finder commentary series for a personal snow day
The post is almost entirely photos with minimal text, a rare format for Daring Fireball
Shows the informal, personal tone of early blogging culture
money_quotes: Continuing commentary regarding the Mac OS X Finder has been postponed, due to a tremendously fun pile of snow.
key_insight: Even the most dedicated tech commentator knows when to set aside the keyboard and go play in the snow.
